## Release Summary

- Why this release exists and what users should upgrade for.

## Added

- New capabilities, exported symbols, or guides.

## Changed

- Behavior updates and migrations.

## Fixed

- Bug fixes and regressions resolved.

## Deprecated

- Features that remain available but should be avoided.

## Removed

- Breaking removals (if any).

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run docs:api`
